title: MODAFINIL
description: Modafinil is a wakefulness-promoting agent originally developed to treat narcolepsy, shift work sleep disorder, and sleep apnea. It has gained popularity as a cognitive enhancer due to its ability to promote alertness and improve focus without the jittery effects of traditional stimulants.

research.title: Modafinil Treatment of Cocaine Dependence: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
research.summary: Analysis of 11 trials assessing modafinil's effectiveness for treating cocaine dependency, concluding it is not generally superior to placebo, though US subgroup analysis showed some promise for abstinence.

research.title: Caffeine and modafinil modulate the effects of sleep deprivation on thalamic resting-state functional connectivity
research.summary: Both substances affected functional brain connectivity after 36 hours of sleep deprivation, providing insights into neural mechanisms and potential strategies for mitigating cognitive impairment.

research.title: Modafinil Therapy and Mental Status Following Aneurysmal Subarachnoid Hemorrhage
research.summary: Modafinil improved alertness and orientation shortly after administration in aSAH patients, suggesting beneficial effects for early mental recovery in acute care settings.

research.title: Effects of modafinil on nocturnal sleep patterns in patients with narcolepsy
research.summary: Modafinil improved daytime sleepiness without significantly worsening nighttime sleep, reducing awakenings in females and increasing sleep onset latency in children/adolescents.

research.title: Chronic administration of caffeine, modafinil, AVL-3288 and CX516 induces time-dependent complex effects on cognition and mood
research.summary: In sleep-deprived mice, caffeine reduced anxiety and enhanced memory over time; AVL-3288 and CX516 improved cognition without depression-like effects, unlike other substances tested.

research.title: Effects of modafinil on epileptiform activity in absence epilepsy
research.summary: Modafinil significantly reduced both number and duration of epileptic seizures in absence epilepsy models, suggesting potential as a preventive treatment.

research.title: Comparison of Solriamfetol and Modafinil on Arousal and Anxiety-Related Behaviors in Narcoleptic Mice
research.summary: Both drugs promoted wakefulness effectively; solriamfetol did so without significant anxiety or locomotor increases, while modafinil induced anxiety-related behaviors.

research.title: Atomoxetine promotes incentive value of modafinil and sensitizes exploratory behavior
research.summary: Combined modafinil and atomoxetine showed noradrenergic system increases addictive potential and exploratory behavior in rats.

research.title: Modafinil exerts anticonvulsive effects against lithium-pilocarpine-induced status epilepticus in rats
research.summary: Modafinil decreased seizure severity and brain inflammation in status epilepticus, potentially through TNF-α and nitric oxide pathway mechanisms.

research.title: Modafinil ameliorates the decline in pronunciation-related working memory caused by sleep deprivation
research.summary: Modafinil significantly improved task accuracy and response times compared to placebo in sleep-deprived men, counteracting cognitive decline from acute sleep deprivation.

sentiment.summary: Users generally report positive experiences with modafinil for productivity and focus, though individual responses vary. Many consider it effective for demanding cognitive tasks.

effects.label: Highly Effective for Sleep Disorders:
effects.description: Proven efficacy for narcolepsy and shift work disorder.

effects.label: Cognitive Enhancement:
effects.description: Mixed evidence for healthy individuals, but many users report subjective benefits.

effects.label: Tolerance Development:
effects.description: Some users report diminished effects over time with daily use.

dosage.label: Standard Dose:
dosage.description: 100-200mg once daily, typically in the morning.

dosage.label: Starting Low:
dosage.description: Many recommend starting with 50-100mg to assess tolerance.

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Best taken early in the day to avoid sleep interference.

sideEffects.label: Headache:
sideEffects.description: Most common side effect, often mitigated by staying well-hydrated.

sideEffects.label: Insomnia:
sideEffects.description: Can occur if taken too late in the day.

sideEffects.label: Rare but Serious:
sideEffects.description: Stevens-Johnson syndrome has been reported in rare cases.

availability.label: Prescription Required:
availability.description: Modafinil is a Schedule IV controlled substance in the US.

availability.label: Generic Availability:
availability.description: Generic versions are significantly cheaper than brand name Provigil.

availability.label: Online Sources:
availability.description: Various international pharmacies offer modafinil, though legality varies by country.
